title: Managing your money, banking and taxes in New Zealand :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Managing your money, banking and taxes in New Zealand
If you live and work in New Zealand, you will need to set up a bank account to manage your money, and an IRD number so you can pay taxes here.
- Paying taxes in New Zealand The New Zealand Government uses the taxes it collects to fund services that benefit all New Zealanders. All taxes are paid to Inland Revenue — the government's tax department.

## Paying taxes in New Zealand
The New Zealand Government uses the taxes it collects to fund services that benefit all New Zealanders. All taxes are paid to Inland Revenue — the government's tax department.
- Banking in New Zealand New Zealand has a sophisticated and accessible banking system — and you may be able to open a bank account before you move here.

## Banking in New Zealand
New Zealand has a sophisticated and accessible banking system — and you may be able to open a bank account before you move here.
